error.chart_format_brackets_mismatch: Chart format lists must use matching [ and ] brackets.

error.effect_file_not_found: The specified background effect file was not found.
error.file_ignored_due_to_id_missing: This file was ignored because Song ID is missing. Set a numeric Song ID in Margrete.

error.jacket_file_not_found: The specified jacket file was not found.
error.preview_stop_greater_than_start: Preview stop time must be greater than the start time.
error.size_incompatible: Expected {0} bytes for {1}, but only {2} were available.
error.stage_background_required: A background image path is required to build a stage.

hint.preview_stop_clamped: Preview stop time ({0} s) exceeds the maximum ({1} s) and has been clamped to prevent overflow.

mg.concurrent_ex_effects: Different EX effects overlap at the same tick: {0}. The game will display only one of them.
mg.head_bpm_not_found: No BPM change was found at tick 0.
mg.head_time_signature_event_not_found: No time signature was found at bar 0. Defaulting to 4/4.

mg.no_sortname_provided: No sort name was provided. A sort name has been generated from the title.
mg.note_overlapped_in_different_til: This note overlaps another note on a different timeline (same tick, lane, and width).
mg.overlapping_air_parent_slide: More Slide ends than Air notes share this position, so an Air parent cannot be determined uniquely. Separate overlapping Slide ends by at least one tick.

warn.duplicate_id_and_difficulty: Multiple charts share the same Song ID and difficulty. The last scanned file will be used.
warn.more_than_one_chart_marked_main: Multiple charts for this Song ID are tagged with `#meta main`. The first match will be used as the baseline difficulty.
warn.no_chart_marked_main: No baseline difficulty is set for this Song ID. The highest-difficulty chart will be used by default. To choose one explicitly, add `#meta main` to the chart comment.
warn.preview_later_than_120: Preview start time is later than 120 seconds. This may cause the game to freeze on the song select screen.
warn.stage_already_exists: Stage '{0}' with ID {1} already exists in the asset database.
warn.we_chart_must_be_unique_id: World's End charts must use a unique Song ID; otherwise other difficulties will not appear under normal song categories.
